candidates.text: Funny how the narrative falls apart once people actually watch Supergirl. People walking out of screenings reportedly said things like, "I thought it would suck, but I loved it," and "It blew me away." That's what happens when months of bad-faith narratives convince people to skip a movie before seeing it. What ruined this movie is the bias campaign against it.

candidates.text: 9ja millionaires are paying this bro $20k - $30k to pretend that he ran into them on the street and request for an interview Dangote flew him into the country because he needed some eye balls on his upcoming public offering And after the video was posted, every rich person in the country wants an interview Nothing bad about that but it’s irks me that they have to pretend he ran into them on the street.
